rubrics: The response classifies the policy as REGULATORY_COST
The response sets income_effect_exists to false
The response includes PPI data for packaging materials with FRED or BLS series IDs
The response identifies input cost pass-through as a primary channel
The response marks wage_change as a NULL or NONE channel with explicit reason
The response marks demand_stimulus as a NULL or NONE channel
The downstream_directives tell the consumer agent to SKIP income-side calculations
The downstream_directives tell the housing agent to SKIP demand_channel_from_income_growth
The response includes analogous cases (California bag ban, EU directive, or similar)
